title: Shear sheep to novice level
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Shear sheep to novice level demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Lubricate working surfaces and moving parts.
